use_cases: Call-to-action button that reveals text on hover for space-efficient UI
Navigation button with animated expansion for modern web interfaces
E-commerce buy or visit buttons with interactive hover states
Marketing page CTA buttons with engaging micro-interactions
Icon button that expands to show label for progressive disclosure patterns
ai_summary: An interactive expandable button component featuring a gradient background that transforms from a compact circular icon to an elongated pill shape on hover, revealing text with a smooth opacity and translate animation. The button includes a border accent and arrow icon for clear visual hierarchy and user guidance.
